caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black sweatshirt with the words "BOSS TALK" on the chest sits at a desk in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the words "UNIQUE MUSTLE" and several gold stars. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black mug with red text sits on the desk. In the background, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is looking toward the left of the frame, and as the sequence progresses, he slightly shifts his head and facial expression while remaining in a seated position. A small logo containing the words "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
